summary: Frontend E2E verified on preview URL. Create -> async job polling -> navigate to /results/{id} works. Progress label transitions from initial hint to 'Synthesizing your blueprint… Ns' and increments. All 9 [data-testid^=section-] render. PDF download returns a valid %PDF file (~21.8KB).
critical_code_review_comments: Create.jsx submit() correctly uses startBlueprintJob + pollJob (2.5s cadence, 180s cap).
Nice UX: progress label reads 'Sending your idea…' then 'Synthesizing your blueprint… Ns' updated per poll tick.
Observed 9 sections: problem, objectives, canvas, swot, risk, requirements, stories, backlog, roadmap — matches spec.
seed_data_creation: Generated one blueprint (SprintDeck) via example-0 during test; blueprint_id=72e8b573-bc81-4ba1-8b3e-21df50882c8d.
context_for_next_testing_agent: E2E flow now green. Generation took ~10-30s in this run. If regressions appear, first check /api job endpoints and Create.jsx pollJob timeout (180s).
